video.explanation: A chatbot is designed to support multi-channel communication including email, phone, and live chat, providing automated customer support across all these channels.

video.text: You use Azure Machine Learning designer to build a model pipeline. What should you create before you can run the pipeline?
video.explanation: Before running a pipeline in Azure Machine Learning designer, you must attach a compute resource (compute target) to execute the pipeline steps.

video.text: Which of the following is used to identify multiple types of items in one image?
video.explanation: Object detection identifies and locates multiple different types of objects within a single image by generating bounding boxes for each detected item.

video.text: For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No.

statements.text: A webchat bot can interact with users visiting a website.
Automatically generating captions for pre-recorded videos is an example of natural language processing.
A smart device in the home that responds to questions such as "what will the weather be like today" is an example of natural language processing.

video.explanation: Webchat bots are deployed on websites to interact with visitors. Caption generation from audio/video is NLP. Smart home assistants use NLP to interpret and respond to spoken questions.

video.text: Which of the following services can you use to train an object detection model by using your own images?
video.explanation: Custom Vision allows you to upload your own labeled images and train a custom object detection model to identify specific objects relevant to your use case.

video.text: An AI solution that helps photographers take better portrait photographs by providing feedback on exposure, noise, and occlusion is an example of facial ___.
video.explanation: Facial analysis evaluates attributes of faces such as exposure, noise, and occlusion quality, making it suitable for photography feedback systems.

video.text: For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No.

statements.text: Chatbots can support voice input.
A separate chatbot is required for each communication channel.
Chatbots manage conversation flows by using a combination of natural language and constrained option responses.

video.explanation: Chatbots support voice via speech recognition. One bot can connect to multiple channels (Teams, webchat, email) through Azure Bot Service. Conversation flows typically combine NLP understanding with structured menu options.

video.text: You are designing a system to predict the prices of insurance for drivers in the United Kingdom. You need to minimize bias in the system. What should you do?

options.text: Remove information about protected characteristics from the data before sampling.
Take a training sample that is representative of the population in the United Kingdom.
Create a training dataset that uses data from global insurers.
Take a completely random training sample.

video.explanation: To minimize bias, the training data should be representative of the actual population (UK drivers). A random or global sample may not reflect the UK population accurately, and removing protected characteristics alone does not ensure representativeness.

video.text: Match the tool to the Azure Machine Learning task. Each tool may be used once, more than once, or not at all.

targets.text: Create a machine learning workspace
Use a drag-and-drop interface used to train and deploy models
Use a wizard to select configurations for a machine learning run

video.explanation: Azure Portal is used to create and manage workspaces. Machine Learning Designer provides a drag-and-drop interface. Automated Machine Learning uses a wizard to auto-select model configurations.

video.text: You need to create a model that labels a collection of your personal digital photographs. Which Azure Cognitive Services service should you use?
video.explanation: Custom Vision allows you to build, deploy, and improve your own image classifiers with custom labels. It is specifically designed for training models on your own image datasets.

video.text: Match the Azure Cognitive Services to the appropriate actions. Each service may be used once, more than once, or not at all.

targets.text: Convert spoken requests into text.
Identify the intent of a user's requests.
Apply intent to entities and utterances.

video.explanation: Speech service handles speech-to-text conversion. Language Service provides intent recognition (CLU/LUIS) and entity extraction from text.

video.text: You have a dataset that contains columns ColumnA (Integer), ColumnB (Numeric), ColumnC (Numeric), ColumnD (Numeric), and ColumnE (Numeric). You have a machine learning model that predicts the value of ColumnE based on the other numeric columns. Which type of model is this?
video.explanation: A model that predicts a numeric value (ColumnE) based on other numeric features is a regression model. Clustering groups unlabeled data, and analysis is not a standard ML model type.

video.text: For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No.

statements.text: Chatbots can only be built by using custom code.
The Azure Bot Service provides services that can be used to host conversational bots.
Bots built by using the Azure Bot Service can communicate with Microsoft Teams users.

video.explanation: Azure Bot Service allows building bots without custom code using templates and the Bot Framework. It provides hosting for conversational bots and supports multiple channels including Microsoft Teams.

video.text: You have a knowledge base of frequently asked questions (FAQ). You create a bot that uses the knowledge base to respond to customer requests. You need to identify what the bot can perform without adding additional skills. What should you identify?

options.text: Answer questions from multiple users simultaneously.
Provide customers with return materials authorization (RMA) numbers.

video.explanation: A FAQ-based bot can answer questions from multiple users simultaneously as its core capability. Registering purchases, complaints, or providing RMA numbers require additional skills beyond a simple knowledge base.

video.text: Which two scenarios are examples of a conversational AI workload?

options.text: A telephone answering service that has a pre-recorded message.
A chatbot that provides users with the ability to find answers on a website by themselves.
Telephone voice menus to reduce the load on human resources.
A service that creates frequently asked questions (FAQ) documents by crawling public websites.

video.explanation: Conversational AI involves interactive two-way dialogue. A chatbot (B) and telephone voice menus (C) both engage users in conversation. A pre-recorded message (A) is one-way, and a FAQ crawler (D) generates documents rather than conversing.

video.text: Which scenario is an example of a webchat bot?

options.text: Determine whether reviews entered on a website for a concert are positive or negative, and then add a thumbs up or thumbs down emoji to reviews.
Translate into English questions entered by customers at a kiosk so that the appropriate person can call the customers back.
Accept questions through email, and then route the email messages to the correct person based on the content of the message.
From a website interface, answer common questions about scheduled events and ticket purchases for a music festival.

video.explanation: A webchat bot interacts with users through a website interface. Option D describes a chatbot answering questions directly on a website. The other options involve sentiment analysis, translation, or email routing.

video.text: You need to develop a web-based AI solution for a customer support system. Users must be able to interact with a web app that will guide them to the best resource or answer. Which service should you use?
video.explanation: Azure Language Service (which includes Question Answering, formerly QnA Maker) is used to build conversational AI solutions that guide users to the best resource or answer based on natural language queries.

video.text: You need to identify groups of rows with similar numeric values in a dataset. Which type of machine learning should you use?
video.explanation: Clustering is an unsupervised machine learning technique used to group data points with similar characteristics. It is ideal for identifying groups of rows with similar numeric values in a dataset.

video.text: You are designing a system that will generate insurance quotes automatically. Match the Microsoft responsible AI principles to the appropriate requirements. Each principle may be used once, more than once, or not at all.

targets.text: A customer's personal information must be visible only to staff who are involved in the decision-making process.
The decision-making process must be recorded so that staff can identify the reasoning behind a particular quote.
The system must be accessible to customers who use screen readers or other assistive technology.

video.explanation: Privacy and Security protects personal data access. Transparency ensures decision processes are recorded and understandable. Inclusiveness ensures systems are accessible to all users, including those using assistive technology.

video.text: For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No.

statements.text: Azure Bot Service and Azure AI Services can be integrated.
Azure Bot Service engages with customers in a conversational manner.
Azure Bot Service can import frequently asked questions (FAQ) to question and answer sets.

video.explanation: Azure Bot Service integrates natively with Azure AI Services (e.g. Language, Speech). Bots are designed for conversational interaction with users. Azure Bot Service supports importing FAQ documents to build question-and-answer knowledge bases.

video.text: Select the answer that correctly completes the sentence.
video.sentence: A historian can use [BLANK] to digitize newspaper articles.
video.explanation: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) extracts text from images, making it the right tool to digitize printed newspaper articles. Azure AI Vision provides OCR capabilities for this use case.

video.text: You need to build an app that will read recipe instructions aloud to support users who have reduced vision. Which Azure AI service should you use?
video.explanation: Azure AI Speech provides text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis, enabling apps to convert text into spoken audio. This is ideal for reading recipe instructions aloud to visually impaired users.

video.text: You are authoring a Conversational Language Understanding application to support a music festival. You want users to be able to ask questions about scheduled shows, such as: 'Which act is playing on the main stage?' The question 'Which act is playing on the main stage?' is an example of which type of element?
video.explanation: An utterance is the actual text or speech a user provides to the application. 'Which act is playing on the main stage?' is the literal input phrase. The intent would be what the user wants to do (e.g. GetScheduleInfo), and an entity would be a specific value like 'main stage'.

video.text: For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No.

statements.text: Azure Language service can identify in which language text is written.
Azure Language service can detect handwritten signatures in a document.
Azure Language service can identify companies and organizations mentioned in a document.

video.explanation: Language detection is a core feature of Azure Language service. Handwritten signature detection belongs to Azure AI Document Intelligence (Form Recognizer), not the Language service. Named Entity Recognition (NER) in Azure Language service can identify organizations and companies.

video.text: You have a bot that identifies the brand names of products in images of supermarket shelves. Which service does the bot use?

options.text: AI enrichment for Azure search capabilities

video.explanation: Identifying specific brand names on products requires training a custom model on those specific brands. Azure Custom Vision Image Classification allows you to train a model on your own labeled images (e.g. product brand images) to classify them accurately.

video.text: Select the answer that correctly completes the sentence.
video.sentence: While presenting at a conference, your session is transcribed into subtitles for the audience. This is an example of [BLANK].
video.explanation: Speech recognition (speech-to-text) converts spoken audio into written text, which is exactly what transcribing a conference session into subtitles does.

video.text: Which of the following can be performed using Azure AI vision capabilities?

options.text: Develop a text-based chatbot for a website.
Identify anomalous customer behaviour on an online store.
Integrate a facial recognition feature into an app.
Suggest automated responses to incoming email.

video.explanation: Azure AI Vision (Face service) provides facial recognition capabilities. Options A and D are NLP/conversational AI tasks; B is anomaly detection.

video.text: For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No.

statements.text: Object detection can identify the location of a damaged product in an image.
Object detection can identify multiple instances of a damaged product in an image.
Object detection can identify multiple types of damaged products in an image.

video.explanation: Object detection identifies what objects are present (with bounding boxes), their location, and can detect multiple instances and types in a single image.

video.text: Which service should you use to extract text, key/value pairs, and table data automatically from scanned documents?
video.explanation: Azure AI Document Intelligence (formerly Form Recognizer) extracts text, key/value pairs, and table data from documents. Custom Vision is for image classification/detection; Face is for facial analysis; Language is for NLP.

video.text: Which Azure AI Vision feature can you use to generate automatic captions for digital photographs?
video.explanation: Image descriptions (caption generation) in Azure AI Vision generates human-readable captions for images. Image tagging assigns keywords; categorization classifies images; type detection identifies image types (clip art, line drawing, etc.).

video.text: Select the answer that correctly completes the sentence.
video.sentence: Azure Machine Learning designer lets you create machine learning models by [BLANK].
options: adding and connecting modules on a visual canvas
automatically performing common data preparation tasks
automatically selecting an algorithm to build the most accurate model
video.correctAnswer: adding and connecting modules on a visual canvas
video.explanation: Azure ML Designer is a drag-and-drop interface where you build pipelines by adding and connecting modules on a visual canvas. AutoML handles automatic algorithm selection; Data preparation tasks are separate; Notebooks are a code-first experience.

microsoft.text: Which type of machine learning algorithm predicts a numeric label associated with an item based on that item's features?
microsoft.explanation: The regression algorithms are used to predict numeric values. Clustering algorithms group data points that have similar characteristics. Classification algorithms are used to predict the category to which an input value belongs. Unsupervised learning is a category of learning algorithms that includes clustering, but not regression or classification.

microsoft.text: Which type of machine learning algorithm assigns items to a set of predefined categories?
microsoft.explanation: Classification algorithms are used to predict a predefined category to which an input value belongs. Regression algorithms are used to predict numeric values. Clustering algorithms group data points that have similar characteristics. Unsupervised learning is a category of learning algorithms that includes clustering, but not regression or classification.

microsoft.text: An electricity utility company wants to develop a mobile app for its customers to monitor their energy use and to display their predicted energy use for the next 12 months. The company wants to use machine learning to provide a reasonably accurate prediction of future energy use by using the customers' previous energy-use data. Which type of machine learning is this?
microsoft.explanation: Regression is a machine learning scenario that is used to predict numeric values. In this example, regression will be able to predict future energy consumption based on analyzing historical time-series energy data based on factors, such as seasonal weather and holiday periods. Multiclass classification is used to predict categories of data. Clustering analyzes unlabeled data to find similarities present in the data. Classification is used to predict categories of data.

microsoft.text: Which assumption of the multiple linear regression model should be satisfied to avoid misleading predictions?

options.text: Features are dependent on each other.
Features are independent of each other.
Labels are dependent on each other.
Labels are independent of each other.

microsoft.explanation: Multiple linear regression models the relationship between several features and a single label. The features must be independent of each other, otherwise the model's predictions will be misleading.

microsoft.text: In a regression machine learning algorithm, what are the characteristics of features and labels in a training dataset?

options.text: known feature values and unknown label values
unknown feature values and known label values

microsoft.explanation: In a regression machine learning algorithm, a training set contains known feature and label values.

microsoft.text: A company is using machine learning to predict various aspects of its e-scooter hire service dependent on weather. This includes predicting the number of hires, the average distance traveled, and the impact on e-scooter battery levels. For the machine learning model, which two attributes are the features? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.
microsoft.explanation: Weather temperature and weekday or weekend are features that provide a weather temperature for a given day and a value based on whether the day is on a weekend or weekday. These are input variables for the model to help predict the labels for e-scooter battery levels, number of hires, and distance traveled. E-scooter battery levels, number of hires, and distance traveled are numeric labels you are attempting to predict with the model.

microsoft.text: You need to use Azure Machine Learning to train a regression model. What should you create in Machine Learning studio?
microsoft.explanation: A job must be created in Machine Learning studio to use Machine Learning to train a regression model. A workspace must be created before you can access Machine Learning studio. An Azure container instance and an AKS cluster can be created as a deployment target, after training of a model is complete.

microsoft.text: You train a regression model by using automated machine learning (automated ML) in the Azure Machine Learning studio. You review the best model summary. You need to publish the model for others to use from the internet. What should you do next?

options.text: Deploy the model to an endpoint.
Split the data into training and validation datasets.

microsoft.explanation: You can deploy the best performing model for client applications to use over the internet by using an endpoint. Compute clusters are used to train the model and are created directly after you create a Machine Learning workspace. Before you can test the model's endpoint, you must deploy it first to an endpoint. Automated ML performs the validation automatically, so you do not need to split the dataset.

microsoft.text: What is an unsupervised machine learning algorithm module for training models in the Azure Machine Learning designer?
microsoft.explanation: K-means clustering is an unsupervised machine learning algorithm component used for training clustering models. You can use unlabeled data with this algorithm. Linear regression and classification are supervised machine learning algorithm components. You need labeled data to use these algorithms. Normalize Data is not a machine learning module.

microsoft.text: Which type of artificial intelligence (AI) workload provides the ability to generate bounding boxes that identify the locations of different types of vehicles in an image?
microsoft.explanation: Object detection provides the ability to generate bounding boxes identifying the locations of different types of vehicles in an image. The other answer choices also process images, but their outcomes are different.

microsoft.text: Which type of artificial intelligence (AI) workload provides the ability to classify individual pixels in an image depending on the object that they represent?
microsoft.explanation: Semantic segmentation provides the ability to classify individual pixels in an image depending on the object that they represent. The other answer choices also process images, but their outcomes are different.

microsoft.text: Which AI service can be integrated into chat applications and generate content in the form of text?
microsoft.explanation: Azure OpenAI is the only service capable of generating text that can be used in chat applications to create conversational experiences. The other workloads are Azure Cognitive Services used for different purposes, but not for generating text used in chat applications.

microsoft.text: Which type of artificial intelligence (AI) workload has the primary purpose of making large amounts of data searchable?
microsoft.explanation: Knowledge mining is an artificial intelligence (AI) workload that has the purpose of making large amounts of data searchable. While other workloads leverage indexing for faster access to large amounts of data, this is not their primary purpose.

microsoft.text: Which artificial intelligence (AI) workload scenario is an example of natural language processing (NLP)?

options.text: extracting key phrases from a business insights report
monitoring for sudden increases in quantity of failed sign-in attempts
predicting whether customers are likely to buy a product based on previous purchases

microsoft.explanation: Extracting key phrases from text to identify the main terms is an NLP workload. Predicting whether customers are likely to buy a product based on previous purchases requires the development of a machine learning model. Monitoring for sudden increases in quantity of failed sign-in attempts is an anomaly detection workload. Identifying objects in landscape images is a computer vision workload.

microsoft.text: You are exploring solutions to improve the document search and indexing service for employees. You need an artificial intelligence (AI) search solution that will include searching text in various types of documents, such as images. Which type of AI workload is this?
microsoft.explanation: Data mining workloads primarily focus on the searching and indexing of data. Computer vision can be used to extract information from images, but it is not a search and indexing solution. Conversational AI is part of natural language processing (NLP) and facilitates the creation of chatbots. Anomaly detection is used to detect outliers in data, such as unusual credit card activity for fraud detection. Semantic segmentation classifies individual pixels in an image.

microsoft.text: Which two artificial intelligence (AI) workload features are part of the Azure Vision in Foundry Tools service? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.
microsoft.explanation: OCR and Spatial Analysis are part of the Azure Vision in Foundry Tools service. Sentiment analysis, entity recognition, and key phrase extraction are not part of the computer vision service.

microsoft.text: Which principle of responsible artificial intelligence (AI) has the objective of ensuring that AI solutions benefit all parts of society regardless of gender or ethnicity?
microsoft.explanation: The inclusiveness principle is meant to ensure that AI solutions empower and engage everyone, regardless of criteria such as physical ability, gender, sexual orientation, or ethnicity. Privacy and security, reliability and safety, and accountability do not discriminate based on these criteria, but also do not emphasize the significance of bringing benefits to all of the society.

microsoft.text: Which principle of responsible artificial intelligence (AI) plays the primary role when implementing an AI solution that meets qualifications for business loan approvals?
microsoft.explanation: Fairness is meant to ensure that AI models do not unintentionally incorporate a bias based on criteria such as gender or ethnicity. Transparency does not apply in this case since banks commonly use their proprietary models when processing loan approvals. Inclusiveness is also out of scope since not everyone is qualified for a loan. Safety is not a primary consideration since there is no direct threat to human life or health in this case.

microsoft.text: Which principle of responsible artificial intelligence (AI) ensures that an AI system meets any legal and ethical standards it must abide by?
microsoft.explanation: The accountability principle ensures that AI systems are designed to meet any ethical and legal standards that are applicable. The privacy and security principle states that AI systems must be designed to protect any personal and/or sensitive data. The inclusiveness principle states that AI systems must empower people in a positive and engaging way. The fairness principle is applied to AI system to ensure that users of the systems are treated fairly.

microsoft.text: Which artificial intelligence (AI) technique should be used to extract the name of a store from a photograph displaying the store front?
microsoft.explanation: OCR provides the ability to detect and read text in images. NLP is an area of AI that deals with identifying the meaning of a written or spoken language, but not detecting or reading text in images. Image classification classifies images based on their contents. Semantic segmentation provides the ability to classify individual pixels in an image.

microsoft.text: Which computer vision solution provides the ability to identify a person's age based on a photograph?
microsoft.explanation: Facial detection provides the ability to detect and analyze human faces in an image, including identifying a person's age based on a photograph. Object detection provides the ability to generate bounding boxes identifying the locations of different types of objects in an image. Image classification classifies images based on their contents. Semantic segmentation provides the ability to classify individual pixels in an image.

microsoft.text: Which process allows you to use optical character recognition (OCR)?

options.text: identifying access control for a laptop

microsoft.explanation: OCR can extract printed or handwritten text from images. In this case, it can be used to extract text from scanned medical records to produce a digital archive from paper-based documents. Identifying wildlife in an image is an example of a computer vision solution that uses object detection and is not suitable for OCR. Identifying a user requesting access to a laptop is done using facial detection and recognition. Translating speech to text uses the Azure AI Speech service.

microsoft.text: Which process allows you to use object detection?

options.text: granting employee access to a secure building

microsoft.explanation: Object detection can be used to track livestock animals, such as cows, to support their safety and welfare. Sentiment analysis is used to return a numeric value based on the analysis of a text. Employee access to a secure building can be achieved by using facial recognition. Extracting text from manuscripts is an example of a computer vision solution that uses optical character recognition (OCR).

microsoft.text: What allows you to identify different types of bone fractures in X-ray images?
microsoft.explanation: Image classification is part of computer vision and can be used to evaluate images from an X-ray machine to quickly classify specific bone fracture types. Object detection returns identified objects in an image, such as a cat, person, or chair. Conversational AI creates intelligent bots that can interact with people by using natural language. Facial detection detects the location of human faces in an image.

microsoft.text: What allows you to identify different vehicle types in traffic monitoring images?
microsoft.explanation: Object detection can be used to evaluate traffic monitoring images to quickly classify specific vehicle types, such as car, bus, or cyclist. Linear regression is a machine learning training algorithm for training regression models. Image classification is concerned with the primary contents of an image. OCR is used to extract text and handwriting from images.

microsoft.text: Which two specialized domain models are supported by using the Azure Vision in Foundry Tools service? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.
microsoft.explanation: The Azure Vision in Foundry Tools service supports the celebrities and landmarks specialized domain models. It does not support specialized domain models for animals, cars, or plants.

microsoft.text: When using the Azure Face in Foundry Tools service, what should you use to perform one-to-many or one-to-one face matching? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.
microsoft.explanation: Face identification in the Azure AI Face service can address one-to-many matching of one face in an image to a set of faces in a secure repository. Face verification has the capability for one-to-one matching of a face in an image to a single face from a secure repository or a photo to verify whether they are the same individual. Face attributes, the find similar faces operation, and Azure AI Custom Vision do not verify the identity of a face.

microsoft.text: Which service can you use to train an image classification model?
microsoft.explanation: Azure AI Custom Vision is an image recognition service that allows you to build and deploy your own image models. The Azure AI vision service, Azure AI Face service, and Azure Language in Foundry Tools service do not provide the capability to train your own image model.

microsoft.text: What can you use to analyze images of people to identify whether specific human-related visual features are present?

options.text: Azure AI Face in Foundry Tools
Azure AI Video Indexer in Foundry Tools
Azure Document Intelligence in Foundry Tools

microsoft.explanation: Azure AI Face in Foundry Tools is specifically designed to analyze images of people and detect human-related visual features in a responsible and supported manner. Azure Vision in Foundry Tools provides general image analysis capabilities. Azure Document Intelligence in Foundry Tools extracts information from documents, and Azure AI Video Indexer is intended for analyzing video content rather than individual images.

microsoft.text: Which natural language processing (NLP) technique assigns values to words such as plant and flower, so that they are considered closer to each other than a word such as airplane?
microsoft.explanation: Vectorization captures semantic relationships between words by assigning them to locations in n-dimensional space. Lemmatization, also known as stemming, normalizes words before counting them. Frequency analysis counts how often a word appears in a text. N-grams extend frequency analysis to include multi-term phrases.

microsoft.text: What is the confidence score returned by the Azure Language in Foundry Tools detection service of natural language processing (NLP) for an unknown language name?
microsoft.explanation: NaN, or not a number, designates an unknown confidence score. Unknown is a value with which the NaN confidence score is associated. The score values range between 0 and 1, with 0 designating the lowest confidence score and 1 designating the highest confidence score.

microsoft.text: Which two Azure AI Services features can be used to enable both text-to-text and speech-to-text between multiple languages? Each correct answer presents part of the solution.

options.text: the Azure Speech in Foundry Tools

microsoft.explanation: The Azure AI Speech in Foundry Tools can be used to generate spoken audio from a text source for text-to-speech translation. The Azure Translator in Foundry Tools service directly supports text-to-text translation in more than 60 languages. Key phrase extraction, Conversational Language Understanding, and language detection are not used for language translation for text-to-text and speech-to-text translation.

microsoft.text: Which two features of Azure AI Services allow you to identify issues from support question data, as well as identify any people and products that are mentioned? Each correct answer presents part of the solution.

options.text: Azure Speech in Foundry Tools service

microsoft.explanation: Key phrase extraction is used to extract key phrases to identify the main concepts in a text. Named entity recognition can identify and categorize entities in unstructured text, such as people, places, organizations, and quantities. The Azure Speech in Foundry Tools service, Conversational Language Understanding, and Azure AI Bot Service are not designed for identifying key phrases or entities.

microsoft.text: Which Azure Language in Foundry Tools feature allows you to analyze written articles to extract information and concepts, such as people and locations, for classification purposes?
microsoft.explanation: Named entity recognition can identify and categorize entities in unstructured text, such as people, places, organizations, and quantities, and is suitable to support the development of an article recommendation system. Key phrase extraction, Content Moderator, and the PII feature are not suited to entity recognition tasks to build a recommender system.

microsoft.text: Which type of translation does the Azure Translator in Foundry Tools service support?
microsoft.explanation: The Azure Translator in Foundry Tools service supports text-to-text translation, but it does not support speech-to-speech, text-to-speech, or speech-to-text translation.

microsoft.text: Which three features are elements of the Azure Speech in Foundry Tools service? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.
microsoft.explanation: Language identification, speaker recognition, and voice assistants are all elements of the Azure Speech in Foundry Tools service. Text translation and document translation are part of the Translator service.

microsoft.text: Which feature of the Azure Translator in Foundry Tools service is available only to Custom Translator?
microsoft.explanation: Model training with a dictionary can be used with Custom Translator when you do not have enough parallel sentences to meet the 10,000 minimum requirements. The resulting model will typically complete training much faster than with full training and will use the baseline models for translation along with the dictionaries you have added.

microsoft.text: Which feature of the Azure Speech in Foundry Tools service can identify distinct user voices?
microsoft.explanation: Speech recognition uses audio data to analyze speech and determine recognizable patterns that can be mapped to distinct user voices. Azure Speech in Foundry Tools synthesis is concerned with vocalizing data, usually by converting text to speech. Azure Speech in Foundry Tools translation is concerned with multilanguage translation of speech. Language identification is used to identify languages spoken in audio when compared against a list of supported languages.

microsoft.text: At which layer can you apply content filters to suppress prompts and responses for a responsible generative AI solution?
microsoft.explanation: The safety system layer includes platform-level configurations and capabilities that help mitigate harm. For example, the Azure OpenAI service includes support for content filters that apply criteria to suppress prompts and responses based on the classification of content into four severity levels (safe, low, medium, and high) for four categories of potential harm (hate, sexual, violence, and self-harm).

microsoft.text: To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option.
microsoft.sentence: [BLANK] can return responses, such as natural language, images, or code, based on natural language input.
microsoft.explanation: Generative AI models offer the capability of generating responses such as natural language, images, or code based on natural language input by using DALL-E models and large language models. The other AI capabilities are used in different contexts to achieve other goals.

microsoft.text: As per the NIST AI Risk Management Framework, what is the first stage to consider when developing a responsible generative AI solution?

options.text: Measure the presence of potential harms.

microsoft.explanation: Identifying potential harms is the first stage when planning a responsible generative AI solution.

microsoft.text: To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option.
microsoft.sentence: Generative AI is used to generate [BLANK].
options: classifications that assign data to predefined categories
new content based on patterns learned from training data
new datasets created during the model training process
predictions about future values in structured datasets
microsoft.correctAnswer: new content based on patterns learned from training data
microsoft.explanation: Generative AI models are designed to create original outputs, such as text, images, and code, by using learning patterns and relationships from large datasets. They do not generate new datasets during training, predict future numeric values, or assign data to predefined categories.

microsoft.text: You are using a generative AI solution. You need to ensure that users understand the purpose of the solution and the potential impact of its outputs. Which responsible AI risk should you identify and mitigate?
microsoft.explanation: The correct answer is lack of transparency, because ensuring that users understand the purpose of a generative AI solution and the potential impact of its outputs is a core aspect of the transparency principle of responsible AI. Adversarial vulnerability relates to security and robustness, bias or unfair outcomes relate to fairness, and lack of accessibility relates to inclusiveness.

microsoft.text: Which generative AI model is used to generate images based on natural language prompts?
microsoft.explanation: DALL-E is a model that can generate images from natural language. GPT-4 and GPT-3.5 can understand and generate natural language and code but not images. Embeddings can convert text into numerical vector form to facilitate text similarity. Whisper can transcribe and translate speech to text.

microsoft.text: Which part of speech synthesis in natural language processing (NLP) involves breaking text into individual words such that each word can be assigned phonetic sounds?
microsoft.explanation: Tokenization is part of speech synthesis that involves breaking text into individual words such that each word can be assigned phonetic sounds. Transcribing is part of speech recognition, which involves converting speech into a text representation. Key phrase extraction is part of language processing, not speech synthesis. Lemmatization, also known as stemming, is part of language processing, not speech synthesis.

microsoft.text: To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option.
microsoft.sentence: The Microsoft Foundry models catalog can be used to [BLANK].
microsoft.explanation: The Microsoft Foundry models catalog enables users to discover, compare, and evaluate models, including testing the models interactively in a playground before selecting one for use.

microsoft.text: To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option.
microsoft.sentence: Microsoft Foundry can be used to [BLANK].
options: build, customize, and manage AI apps and agents
monitor the performance metrics of virtual machines
store and version structured training data
train large language models (LLMs) from raw datasets

microsoft.text: For which audience is Microsoft Foundry primarily intended?

business users who want to build machine learning models without writing code

microsoft.explanation: Microsoft Foundry is designed for AI developers and technical decision-makers who want to build generative AI applications and custom copilot experiences by using managed services and tools in Azure. It is not intended as a no-code machine learning platform for business users, a full data science environment for large-scale model training, or a framework specifically for integrating models into Windows applications.
